note: Headless Godot runner not applicable to web-demo TypeScript target. Audit performed via direct code analysis of deferred C85 issues and new file scope.

C85-1_CoastBiome_double_free.reason: File not read — read budget exhausted on new scope. Carry forward to C87.

C85-2_mg_sang_froid_timeInside_clamp.note: Not refuted by current session reads. Clamp fix required.

C85-3_CardOverlay_NVDA_announce.note: Order-of-ops ARIA issue not observed fixed in files read this cycle.

C85-4_mg_regard_spurious_rAF.note: Missing-return rAF leak separate from seqLen fix — not confirmed resolved.

bugs.description: Unavailable ogham slots use aria-disabled='true' but no HTML disabled attribute. Tab navigation still reaches them and Enter/Space activates them (click handler has isAvailable guard, but keyboard activation path bypasses the guard).
bugs.fix: Set the HTML disabled attribute on unavailable slots, or add a keydown guard that calls e.preventDefault() when aria-disabled='true'.

bugs.description: After the overlay becomes visible, focus is not moved into the dialog. WCAG 2.1 SC 2.1.2 requires focus to enter a modal on open. Keyboard users cannot reach slots without manual Tab traversal from outside.
bugs.fix: After overlay.style.display='flex', call skipBtn.focus() or the first available slot button's .focus().

bugs.description: Restart Promise is created inline with no module-level resolve ref. If showRunSummary() is re-entered before the button is clicked (existing.remove() at line 112 fires), the prior Promise never resolves — async deadlock / softlock for the caller awaiting this function.
bugs.fix: Hoist the resolve reference to module scope and null it defensively on re-entry, mirroring OghamPanel's resolveChoice pattern.

bugs.description: restartBtn has no visible focus-ring style. Fails WCAG 2.4.7 (Focus Visible) for keyboard users.
bugs.fix: Add a :focus-visible outline via a CSS class or inline focus/blur event listener.

bugs.description: console.info and console.warn calls present in production path (loadTemplates). Violates no-console rule in coding-style.
bugs.fix: Guard behind a debug flag or remove for production bundle.

no_issues_found: CardSystem.ts 1-100: no hardcoded secrets, no API keys. EMERGENCY_TEMPLATE present. Ring buffer (RECENT_CARD_BUFFER=3) correctly prevents triple repeats.
OghamPanel.ts: escapeHandler correctly de-registered in selectOgham() and hideOghamPanel() — no listener leak.
OghamPanel.ts: resolveChoice nulled in both exit paths — no double-resolve.
RunSummary.ts: overlay.remove() on re-entry prevents DOM accumulation.
RunSummary.ts: no hardcoded secrets or credentials.

issues.issue: OghamPanel: aria-disabled buttons reachable and activatable via keyboard
issues.recommendation: Add HTML disabled attribute to unavailable slots

issues.issue: OghamPanel: focus not trapped on dialog open
RunSummary: inline Promise resolve ref risks async deadlock on re-entry
issues.recommendation: Hoist resolve to module scope with null-guard on re-entry
